top_signals.title: Police raid malware network tied to Russia's Evil Corp hacker group
top_signals.summary: An international operation targeted the SocGholish botnet, which has been linked to the Russia-based cybercrime group Evil Corp.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Statement by President von der Leyen following the EU-Moldova Summit
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Statement Brussels, 22 Jun 2026 Dear Maia, Madam President,
Dear António,
Only last week, we opened the first negotiation cluster with Moldova. It is a historic milestone on your European jour...
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: SpaceX kicks off bond sale as it looks to begin mass borrowing spree
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk’s SpaceX has begun selling investment grade bonds for the first time in what is anticipated to be a mass borrowing spree in order to fund the company’s ambitious AI plans following its blockbuster Nasdaq listing. Bank of America, Citigroup, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase & Co and Morgan Stanley are arranging calls with investors [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the Meeting of the Court of Directors held on 23 April 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank's Court of Directors acts as a unitary board, setting the organisation's strategy and budget and taking key decisions on resourcing and appointments. Required to meet a minimum seven times per year, it has five executive members from the Bank and up to nine non-executive members.

top_signals.title: Baillie Gifford launches UK’s first ever tokenised fund
top_signals.summary: Baillie Gifford has launched the UK’s first ever fully tokenised investment fund, in a move that will grant savers the opportunity to invest in short-dated bonds via blockchain-based tokens. The Scottish investment house unveiled its Enhanced Yield Fund on Tuesday, with a mandate actively to manage investors money in a variety of short-term corporate and [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Godiva Japan said to seek extension on $464 million leveraged buyout loan
top_signals.summary: Godiva Japan, which was taken over by Asian private equity fund MBK Partners in 2019, owes about ¥75 billion ($464 million) by the end of this month, according to informed sources.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
